I suppose the server no longer takes suggestions, huh <:wisdom:1400771656510734356>

I'm gonna break this down piece by piece. Because wooweee

https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1354754985119846581/1440858438791069707

Streamlining, making the server a bit more organized and better is good. Having multiple sections for channels like <#1400749543288475770> <#1433513650299076780> is good, since those channels are always active and Mori chat is a cluster mess.


Modmail... Seriously? It's ass, it's like sending a notice to city council and waiting for it to be resolved in months time. I agree reporters should be hidden to not get harassed but not mod decisions. If we're gonna use mod mail we might as well just delete this place, since it might as well be a mailbox that no one opens to read the letters.

Timeout statement - these aren't a bad thing, just "without public statement" is literal corrupt government 101. We're just shutting protestors up for the sake of peace. Again, where do we draw the line? If your logic is sound, reasonable there is no reason why you can't say it in public chat. Please be more transparent give more orderly reasoning.

There's no reason to erase anything in server suggestions, it'll just be drowned out in endless texts and new things as time goes on and flows. This is just putting dirt and cement over an issue and saying it's done and over. Leave it so we can review it in the future. Only thing that should be removed is discussion like what Pood, lud, and pzn did last night which should have moved to gen chat.

Taking it into consideration is almost meaningless, it's politician buzzwords. 

If you are short-staffed please open up mod verification like some of us are asking that are more active part of the community.

The greater community as a whole I like, I spend a lot of my time in game questions, team building or lore chat. If you do want to take it to dms then do so, since it's better then getting a nothing burger <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
